Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class FuturesEnrollmentMetadataCreate

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.FuturesEnrollmentMetadataCreate
public class FuturesEnrollmentMetadataCreate extends Object
FuturesEnrollmentMetadataCreate

Enrollment metadata for the FUTURES enrollment type
